name: Kanzashi the Rikka Flower
desc:
2+ Level 8 monsters
(You can also Xyz Summon this card by using "Kanzashi the Rikka Queen" you control as material.)
You can return 3 "Rikka" monsters from your GY to the Deck; draw 2 cards. You can only use this effect of "Kanzashi the Rikka Flower" once per turn.
When your opponent activates a card or effect (Quick Effect, or Quick-like Effect if this card has a Plant monster as material): You can detach 2 materials from this card; negate that activation, and if you do, Tribute 1 random card in your opponent's hand.
Detach 1 material from this card; add 1 "Rikka" card from your Deck to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Kanzashi the Rikka Flower" once per turn.
strings: Xyz Summon using Kanzashi the Rikka Queen
Return 3 Rikka monsters to Deck to draw 2
Negate activation and Tribute 1 card in opponent's hand
